## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website redesign options and content strategy for Surge AI, weighing Webflow vs custom development approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [No clear consensus reached on Webflow vs custom dev; each has pros/cons](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Current design work by Jean to continue, with refinements based on positioning](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Content roadmap and brand pillars need further alignment/clarification](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Team capacity sufficient for near-term plans; no immediate need for additional design resources](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)

## Topics

### Webflow vs Custom Development Debate

  - [Pros of Webflow:](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [Already implemented and working](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [Easy for non-technical edits (e.g. job postings, blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [Proven scalability (e.g. 4M views/month, hundreds of landing pages for data annotation site)](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
      - [Built-in CMS, security, CDN](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Pros of custom dev:](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Better collaboration via Git-based workflows](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Easier to implement rich, interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [Cleaner long-term maintenance of styles/components](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [GrowthX team more comfortable with custom stack](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### Interactive Content Examples

  - [Anthropic blog posts examined: mostly static with minor interactivity](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [OpenAI examples: some interactive charts using VEGA](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [General consensus: truly rich interactivity rare, often achievable with screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### Design Collaboration & Roadmap

  - [Jean currently handling design, with some implementation support](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide design if needed, but current capacity seems sufficient](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Need to align brand identity/pillars with visual design](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Content roadmap still unclear; positioning doc will help inform this](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

### Brand Positioning & Pillars

  - [Edwin expressed confusion about current pillar definitions](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Renato clarified pillars are deliberately broad, encompassing researcher communication and competitive positioning](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2322.0)
  - [Agreement to have follow-up session to align on pillars and connect to design work](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)

### Next Steps for Website Development

  - [Continue refining current design work by Jean](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Schedule alignment session on brand pillars](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Jean and Renato to review pillars against existing design, make adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
  - [Clarify content roadmap after finalizing positioning document](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Edwin to make final decision on Webflow vs custom development approach](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Schedule pillar alignment session with full team](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Jean and Renato to review design work against finalized pillars](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
  - [Develop more concrete content roadmap based on positioning document](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)
  - [Continue website design refinement, incorporating pillar/positioning insights](https://fathom.video/share/tQnMywKDSvRnZM_UnyufFiKTPDVTKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
